blocks.text: Nine points, no margin: Madrid kick off make-or-break La Liga run-in
Barcelona lead by nine points. Drop points tonight and Madrid's title dream is effectively finished. Alavés are bottom-half fodder — but the pressure is entirely on Los Blancos.
♟️ Thu 17:15 — Carlsen enters Chess.com Open knockout playoffs
🎮 Thu 17:00 — rain & 100 Thieves vs BIG, CCT Global Finals in Porto
⚽ Fri 21:00 — Real Madrid at Real Betis, another title-race crunch in Seville
